prompt: This project still uses the legacy JSON build configuration, which the toolchain has deprecated. Migrate it to the current configuration format. After the migration no JSON build-config files may remain, and moon check plus moon test must pass.
grader_note: 2026-07-17: require the migrated package files and original implementation/tests to survive, then require a nonzero hidden behavior check; deleting or weakening sources/tests or omitting moon.pkg previously could let a no-op migration pass.
